# LearnedLate

> AI Strategy-to-Execution Consultancy for New Zealand and Australian Mid-Market Businesses. Don't Get Left Behind by AI. Turn Strategy into Working Systems.

## About

LearnedLate helps NZ and Australian businesses move from AI confusion to measurable results. We provide end-to-end accountability—from initial readiness assessment through deployed, production-ready AI systems.

**Our Difference:** We don't just advise. We build. We don't just code. We align. Most consultancies leave you with a PowerPoint. Most developers need detailed requirements. We bridge the gap.

## Core Services

### AI Readiness Assessment
Comprehensive four-dimension evaluation (People, Process, Technology, Data) that tells you exactly what you're ready for, what needs work, and where to start for maximum impact.

- Scored assessment across 4 dimensions
- Prioritized opportunity map
- Written summary within 48 hours
- NZ AI Advisory Pilot co-funding eligible (50% up to $15K)
- Investment: $7.5K–$15K (NZ), $10K–$30K (AU)

### Agentic Workflow Implementation
Deploy autonomous AI systems that handle complete business processes end-to-end—not just chatbots, but multi-step, decision-capable agents.

- Workflow mapping and pain point identification
- 2-week prototype → 90-day pilot
- Integration with existing systems
- Continuous improvement built-in

### Custom AI Development
Tailored AI tools when off-the-shelf isn't enough. We build custom only when commercial solutions are demonstrably insufficient.

- Specialized model training
- Unique integration architectures
- Deployment and monitoring
- Scope discipline guaranteed

### Full-Stack AI Delivery
The complete journey from discovery through optimization. Single-point accountability from assessment to production.

- Five-phase journey: Discover → Map → Plan → Build → Optimize
- Same expertise from first conversation to production
- Outcome-based measurement
- Transparent reporting throughout

## Who We Help

- **Growing Teams (<50):** Focused AI workflow sprints, fast results, fixed price, NZ co-funding eligible
- **Mid-Market (50–500):** Full assessment, strategy, and phased implementation—our primary focus
- **Enterprise (500+):** Transformation programs with governance frameworks and multi-year roadmaps

## Key Stats

- 87% of NZ businesses use AI, but only 12% have scaled it effectively
- 95% enterprise pilot failure rate (MIT NANDA 2025)
- +47% ROI for early movers, -14% to -43% for late adopters
- NZ AI Advisory Pilot: 50% co-funding available (up to $15K)

## Contact

- **Book a Free AI Readiness Assessment:** https://learnedlate.com/contact/
- **Email:** hello@learnedlate.com
- **Location:** New Zealand & Australia
- **Twitter:** https://x.com/learnedlate

## Key Principles

1. **Outcome-first:** Lead every engagement with business results, not technical capability
2. **C-suite readable:** Every headline should be understood without technical background
3. **Specificity:** Use numbers, timeframes, and dollar amounts—not vague claims
4. **Honesty:** "If the answer is 'you don't need AI right now,' we'll tell you that too."
5. **Dual fluency:** We speak both business and technical natively
